description: Shared lesson metadata schema for future modules. Copy lesson-template.js and fill in fields.

lessonFields.title: { it: string, en: string }
lessonFields.characterIds: string[] — character keys used in this lesson
lessonFields.audioPlaceholders: boolean — true if audioUrl fields may be filled later
lessonFields.exercises: Exercise[] — see exercise types in ExerciseRenderer

moduleFields.title: { it, en }
moduleFields.units: Unit[] — same shape as classic units.js
